title: Agricultural Intelligent Robot
description: Participated in the development of an agricultural robotic system integrating a mobile platform and manipulator arm. Designed and implemented pipelines for plant data acquisition, 3D reconstruction, robot control, and data analysis, including leaf-level 3D modeling and growth indicator extraction.

title: Pathology Slide Classification & LLM Distillation
description: Automated pathology slide classification using CNN and ResNet18 models, achieving 88% balanced accuracy with lightweight model distillation.

title: Handwritten Chinese Sentence Recognition using CNN-CTC
description: End-to-end handwritten Chinese text recognition system using CNN, BiLSTM, and CTC.
